doctorNote.title: Doctor Tray Preference
doctorNote.detail: Keep articulating paper and distal wall clearance check tools in the front-left lane before proximal break.

items.name: Mirror / Explorer
items.detail: Mirror face up, explorer locked parallel to patient-right edge.
items.note: Doctor wants mirror access first on seat.

items.name: High-speed handpiece
items.detail: Water spray tested and tubing oriented left.
items.note: Primary drive lane for burr swap.

items.name: Burr block // crown prep set
items.detail: Sequence block aligned for reduction then margin finish.

items.name: Retraction cord #00
items.detail: Reserve count is low; backup vial not yet opened.

items.name: Articulating paper
items.detail: Pulled forward per doctor preference for distal wall verification.
items.note: Must stay visible near prep lane.

items.name: Impression material
items.detail: Fallback material missing from rear slab lane.
items.note: Escalate before scan backup is required.

setupChecklist.title: Barrier and isolation check
setupChecklist.detail: Light handles, bracket tray, and suction lines sealed before seating.

setupChecklist.title: Instrument zoning
setupChecklist.detail: Place prep burs by sequence, mirror forward, and orient handpiece tubing left.

setupChecklist.title: Doctor preference staging
setupChecklist.detail: Move articulating paper and distal clearance check tools into front-left lane.

setupChecklist.title: Capture fallback reserve
setupChecklist.detail: Restage impression material or explicitly clear scan-only plan before seating.

confirmation.title: Confirm Setup
confirmation.detail: Lock tray as procedure-ready only when missing items are cleared or acknowledged.
